ground_truth.text: Client shall pay Provider a monthly service fee of $18,000 for regulatory reporting support. Payment is due within fifteen days after receipt of invoice.

test_cases.query: disclosure of patient data trade secrets required by law

ground_truth.text: Provider shall not disclose Client patient data or trade secret material except as required by law.

test_cases.query: how long are audit logs preserved

ground_truth.text: Audit logs are retained for two years unless a legal hold requires longer preservation.
